title: Meriania compressicaulis

The Melastomataceae family is further divided into several genera, with Meriania being one of them. The classification of Meriania compressicaulis places it within the order Myrtales, which is a larger group of flowering plants. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and phylogenetic relationships with other related species.
